title: Comparing Transformers and Hybrid Models at the Token Level
summary: 本文在 token 级别系统比较了 Transformer 与混合模型（如结合卷积或状态空间模型的架构）的性能，揭示不同设计在局部与全局上下文建模上的差异及效率权衡。

tech_highlights: Token-level fine-grained comparison between Transformers and hybrid architectures
Analysis of hybrid models combining self-attention with convolution or state space models
Efficiency-accuracy trade-off insights for token-level language modeling
analysis.score_reason: 对关注模型架构选型和 token 级行为差异的研究者与工程师有直接参考价值，但论文尚未深入披露实现细节。
